summary: The parent packages have enough code, docs, and smoke evidence to run cross-system integration checks. The product has moved from isolated subsystems toward a real survival loop. The previously tracked rigid-pair regression blocker and live-controller e2e probe are resolved; remaining tracked follow-up is final Task 15 source-map/manifest currency plus external release-ops evidence.

findings.title: Parent package dependencies have source-backed evidence
evidence: data/integration/cross_system_integration_matrix.json records task ids, requirements, code files, docs files, smoke files, and markers for kickoff plus Tasks 01-14.
scripts/validation/cross_system_dependency_smoke.gd checks those files, requirement headings, and validation-plan markers.

findings.title: The seven-stage prepare->derelict->survive->loot->craft->return->upgrade loop is now machine-checked
evidence: scripts/validation/e2e_survival_loop_smoke.gd evaluates the seven-stage rubric and balance ledger.
scripts/validation/e2e_combat_loot_craft_smoke.gd composes live damage/threat, loot distribution, inventory/materials, and crafting models.
scripts/validation/e2e_ship_meta_loop_smoke.gd composes power routing, meta payout, and hub upgrade purchase.

findings.title: Some source-map/roadmap status text still reflects earlier package states
evidence: docs/SYNAPTIC_SEA_COMPLETE_SYSTEMS_MAP.md includes historical status rows that predate later Task 01-13 package evidence.
Task 15 already exists as t_c7ac4d08 and is explicitly scoped to systems map, roadmap, requirements, ADR index, manifest, and final board currency.

findings.title: Live main-scene/controller e2e probe is now board-backed
evidence: Task 14 smokes prove system contracts and composite behavior headlessly.
Kanban card t_4e47145d added scripts/validation/live_main_prepare_to_upgrade_probe.gd and registered it in docs/game/06_validation_plan.md.
The probe marker is `LIVE MAIN PREPARE UPGRADE PROBE PASS stages=7 marker=0:0:0 upgrade=hub_storage_basic`.

findings.title: Full regression bundle passes after travel/vitals validation closure
evidence: Kanban card t_cc483347 fixed the original rigid-pair/claim-persistence regression timeout.
Task 14 retry closed the same validation precondition class in `recursive_travel_smoke.gd` and `bay_travel_unbay_smoke.gd`, and isolated `vitals_state_save_load_smoke.gd` from live threat damage.
The full regression bundle from docs/game/06_validation_plan.md now emits `SYNAPSE_SEA REGRESSION PASS commands=163 clean_output=true` with exit code 0.

findings.title: Initial balance sanity envelope exists for the integrated loop
evidence: data/integration/balance_ledger.json defines thresholds for oxygen, hunger, thirst, loot value, craft count, meta currency, and upgrade cost.
docs/game/balance/cross_system_balance_ledger.md records the rationale and safe ranges.
